installCommand: if [ -f package.json ] && [ -d web-dashboard ]; then npm install && npm install --prefix web-dashboard; elif [ -f package.json ] && [ -d web-deshboard ]; then npm install && npm install --prefix web-deshboard; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f web-dashboard/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix web-dashboard; elif [ -f web-deshboard/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix web-deshboard; else npm run build; fi
devCommand: if [ -f web-dashboard/package.json ]; then npm run dev --prefix web-dashboard; elif [ -f web-deshboard/package.json ]; then npm run dev --prefix web-deshboard; else npm run dev; fi
